productDisplayName: Diva Women Printed Multi Coloured Kurta
description: Composition White, purple,pink and brown printed kurta made of 100% cotton fabric, has short sleeves with a brown border and white ribbon on the cuffs, a V-neckline with brown buttons on the chest, a brown panel with white ribbon across the chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look.
